page_content:
GEOG615 Land Cover and Land Use Change (3 Credits)

This class provides an examination of land cover and land use change science, addressing the causes, impacts and projection of change.

Key concepts of land use science are presented and recent research papers and case studies are reviewed. Class consists of lectures, invited presentations and individual student projects and presentations. Prerequisite: GEOG442, GEOG472, GEOG435, or GEOG473; or permission of BSOS-Geography department.
